name: Sai Vikitha
title: Software Engineer
summary: Software Engineer with expertise in Python, AI, and backend systems. Experienced in building scalable applications, developing machine learning solutions, and working with cloud infrastructure.

Improved UI/UX and reduced user errors
Enhanced performance and reduced load issues by 20%
Performed vulnerability assessments using Metasploit and Burp Suite
Analyzed network traffic using Wireshark and Snort
Identified and mitigated security risks
